title: Legal Intern
description:
Vellum is hiring a Legal Intern to join our Legal team in Atlanta, GA (On-site, Intern).
This is an entry-level, learning-focused role for current students or recent grads.

What you'll do:
  - You will review, draft, and negotiate commercial contracts.
  - You will assess legal risk and recommend mitigations.
  - You will partner cross-functionally on privacy and data protection.

What we're looking for:
  - No prior professional experience required.
  - Jd and active bar admission for counsel roles.
  - Sound judgment on legal and business risk.
  - Strong drafting and negotiation skills.
  - Familiarity with: risk assessment, policy drafting, GDPR/CCPA, contract review, regulatory compliance, corporate law.

This internship runs for 12 weeks with the possibility of a return offer.

Full-time role with benefits, equity (where applicable), and PTO.

What you'll do:

  - You will build and evaluate predictive models on large datasets.

What we're looking for:

  - Proficiency in python and its ml ecosystem.
  - Experience taking a model from prototype to production.
  - Familiarity with: MLOps, pandas, PyTorch, A/B testing, computer vision, feature engineering.

Full-time role with benefits, equity (where applicable), and PTO.

Larkspur is hiring a Principal SRE to join our Engineering team in Minneapolis, MN (Remote, Full-time).

What you'll do:

  - You will own the CI/CD and deployment infrastructure.
  - You will improve reliability, on-call, and incident response.

What we're looking for:

  - Strong linux and networking fundamentals.
  - Hands-on experience with kubernetes and a major cloud provider.
  - Infrastructure-as-code experience (terraform or similar).
  - Familiarity with: IaC, observability, Prometheus, Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD.

Full-time role with benefits, equity (where applicable), and PTO.

Fern & Oak is hiring a Lead Data Scientist to join our Data & AI team in San Francisco, CA (On-site, Full-time).

What you'll do:

What we're looking for:

  - Ability to communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders.
  - Strong grounding in statistics and machine learning fundamentals.
  - Experience taking a model from prototype to production.
  - Familiarity with: MLOps, NLP, computer vision, TensorFlow, Python, Spark.

Full-time role with benefits, equity (where applicable), and PTO.

This is an initial 6-12 month contract with potential to convert.

What we're looking for:

  - Familiarity with relational databases and query optimization.
  - Comfort with cloud infrastructure (aws, gcp, or azure).
  - Familiarity with: REST APIs, distributed systems, PostgreSQL, Java, React, gRPC.

This is an initial 6-12 month contract with potential to convert.
